IIT Roorkee Latest Updates and News

30 Jun, 2026 IIT Roorkee JEE Advanced Cutoff 2026 has been released. Check round and course-wise IIT Roorkee JEE Advanced Cutoff 2026.

  • Round 2 Cutoff for B.Tech is 582-10954 for the General Category.
  • B.Arch Round 2 Cutoff is 18863 for the General Category.
...Read More

IIT Roorkee cutoff is available for JEE-Advanced, IIT-JAM, UCEED, GATE, CAT here. You can check category wise IIT Roorkee cutoff for popular courses such as B.Tech, BS + MS, B.Tech + M.Tech, B.Arch, M.Sc, B.Des, MBA, PG Diploma below.

IIT Roorkee offers admission to B.Tech through JEE-Advanced. For Admission in BS + MS courses, IIT Roorkee accept JEE-Advanced score. You can check the table below to know the accepted exams for courses offered by IIT Roorkee (Cutoff Range below is across all categories).

Course Exam Cutoff
B.Tech JEE-Advanced 1 - 8190
BS + MS JEE-Advanced 87 - 11126
B.Tech + M.Tech JEE-Advanced 1191 - 10954
B.Arch JEE-Advanced 1670 - 18863
M.Sc IIT-JAM 24 - 5246
B.Des UCEED 1 - 90
MBA CAT 95

IIT Roorkee JEE-Advanced Cutoff 2026

Students can take admission in B.Tech, BS + MS, B.Tech + M.Tech, B.Arch programs at IIT Roorkee based on JEE-Advanced score. As per IIT Roorkee JEE-Advanced Cutoff 2026, the overall cutoff for B.Tech programs in Round 2 is 1 - 8190 across all categories.

  • For BS + MS, The Overall closing rank in 2026 in Round 2 is 87 - 11126 across all categories.
  • For B.Tech + M.Tech, The Overall closing rank in 2026 in Round 2 is 1191 - 10954 across all categories.
  • For B.Arch, The Overall closing rank in 2026 in Round 2 is 1670 - 18863 across all categories.

B.Tech Computer Science and Engineering, BS + MS Mathematics, B.Tech + M.Tech Geophysical Technology, B.Arch , are the top choices for students appearing in JEE-Advanced.

In 2026, B.Tech Computer Science and Engineering closing rank for General Category is 582 in Round 2.

  • For BS + MS Mathematics, The JEE-Advanced closing rank 2026 for General is 1514 in Round 2.
  • For B.Tech + M.Tech Geophysical Technology, The JEE-Advanced closing rank 2026 for General is 9622 in Round 2.
  • For B.Arch Bachelor of Architecture [B.Arch], The JEE-Advanced closing rank 2026 for General is 18684 - 18863 in Round 2.

You can check B.Tech Computer Science and Engineering, BS + MS Mathematics, B.Tech + M.Tech Geophysical Technology, B.Arch , category-wise closing rank for JEE-Advanced below:

IIT Roorkee JEE-Advanced Cutoff Trends

Admission at IIT Roorkee in B.Tech Programs in 2026 was closed at 8190 rank whereas closing rank in 2025 was 8159 across all categories.

  • Admission in BS + MS Programs in 2026 was closed at 11126 rank whereas closing rank in 2025 was 11130 across all categories.
  • Admission in B.Tech + M.Tech Programs in 2026 was closed at 10954 rank whereas closing rank in 2025 was 10016 across all categories.
  • Admission in B.Arch Programs in 2026 was closed at 18863 rank whereas closing rank in 2025 was 9462 across all categories.

IIT Roorkee IIT-JAM Cutoff 2026

Students can take admission in M.Sc programs at IIT Roorkee based on IIT-JAM score. As per IIT Roorkee IIT-JAM Cutoff 2026, the overall cutoff for M.Sc programs in Round 3 is 24 - 5246 across all categories.

M.Sc Applied Geology, is the top choice for students appearing in IIT-JAM.

In 2026, M.Sc Applied Geology closing rank for General Category is 86 - 88 in Round 3.

Cutoff Summary: IIT Roorkee

  • JEE Advanced
  • IIT JAM
  • UCEED

The JEE Advanced 2025 Cutoff for IIT Roorkee in the General category ranges from 535 to 17665 for admission to its various programs. The Round 1 closing rank for B.Tech Computer Science Engineering is 535, with the last round rank being 592. For B.Tech Data Science and Artificial Intelligence, the Round 1 cutoff is 710 and the last round cutoff is 845. Other competitive courses such as Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering have cutoffs between 1394 and 3897.

Branches including Civil Engineering, Biosciences and Bioengineering, and Geological Technology record cutoffs from 6361 to 10016. Less popular courses like Chemistry and B.Arch have a cutoff range of 10301 to 17665. For OBC-NCL candidates, the Round 1 cutoff is 244 for Computer Science Engineering and the last round cutoff is 6497 for B.Arch. In the SC category, the range is 121 in Round 1 for Computer Science Engineering to 3181 in the last round for B.Arch.

For ST, the range is 74 in Computer Science Engineering to 1492 in BS + MS Physics. Under EWS, the range is 95 in Round 1 for Computer Science Engineering to 2794 in the last round for B.Arch.

...Read More

What is iit roorkee mtech cutoff?

Rudransh SinhaM.Tech student at IIT Roorkee

The GATE cutoff 2024 for M.Tech admissions at IIT Roorkee is not released yet.

However, the GATE cutoff 2022 for IIT Roorkee is as follows- 

GATE Cutoff 2022 (Rank-wise) for M.Tech Admissions at IIT Roorkee:

M.Tech Specialisations General OBC SC ST PD
Chemical Engineering 40.16 36.54 27.31 29.72 30.52
Civil Engineering 43.64 39.54 29.46 29.83 30.22
Electrical Engineering 58 52.23 39.02 40.26 -
Electronics and Communication Engineering 28.99 26.21 19.59 23.1 20.46
Computer Science and Engineering 57.23 51.62 38.51 39.3 422
Mechanical and Industrial Engineering 65.13 58.86 43.83 43.83 44.71

Since the 2024 and 2023 GATE cutoff for IIT Roorkee are not available, the above cutoff 2022 will give you an idea of the minimum rank required for admission into M.Tech at IITR.

What is the M.Tech cutoff 2024 for IIT Roorkee?

Anmol ShrivastavaM.Tech student at IIT Roorkee

The 2024 MTech cutoff is yet to be released for IIT Roorkee.

I have provided the 2022 MTech cutoff for IIT Roorkee for your reference-

MTech Course GEN OBC SC ST PD
Chemical Engineering 40.16 36.54 27.31 29.72 30.52
Civil Engineering 43.64 39.54 29.46 29.83 30.22
Electrical Engineering 58 52.23 39.02 40.26
Electronics and Communication Engineering 28.99 26.21 19.59 23.1 20.46
Computer Science and Engineering 57.23 51.62 38.51 39.3 42.2
Mechanical and Industrial Engineering 65.13 58.86 43.83 43.83 44.72

MTech is one of the most popular postgraduate courses at IIT Roorkee. Many students pursue it as it offers better career prospects and specialised knowledge in their field. 

The MTech programs at IIT Roorkee will deepen your understanding of your area of interest. The comprehensive curriculum and practical experience of MTech programs will make you highly competitive in the job market.

Admission to MTech courses at IIT Roorkee is based on GATE scores. You have to clear the exam and appear in the COAP selection process to secure your seat in the MTech program at IIT Roorkee.

At what rank can I get into IIT Roorkee for Electrical Engineering as a General Candidate?

Himanshu TolaniB.Tech Electrical student at IIT Roorkee

The 2024 JEE Advanced cutoff is yet to be released for IIT Roorkee. 

You can check the previous year cutoff for BTech Electrical Engineering which I have provided below-

IIT Roorkee cutoff 2023 for B.Tech Electrical Engineering-

Course 2023 2022 2021 2020
BTech Electrical Engineering 1965 2103 1945 1811

IIT Roorkee is the best engineering college in Uttarakhand. It is known for its quality education and industry exposure provided to the students through internships and industry projects. 

BTech Electrical Engineering is a popular engineering discipline at IIT Roorkee. The course deals with topics in electrical systems and technologies, which will provide you with an understanding of power generation, distribution and more. You will also be exposed to hands-on experiences through internships and projects. 

IIT Roorkee provides admission to BTech Electrical Engineering through JEE Advanced ranks. You have to clear the exam and appear in the JoSAA counselling to get selected.

What is the JEE Advanced 2024 cutoff for IIT Roorkee?

Charu ChauhanB.Tech student at IIT Roorkee

The 2024 JEE Advanced cutoff has not been released yet by IIT Roorkee. It will be released after each round of JoSAA counselling for BTech courses. It will be released for opening and closing ranks for different categories.

The overall cutoff for round I in 2023 for general category students was between 396 to 16701. I have provided the 2023 JEE Advanced cutoff for IIT Roorkee for some of the top courses. 

JEE Advanced Cutoff 2023 for IIT Roorkee-

Course 2023 2022
BTech Computer Science Engineering 396 408
BTech Electrical Engineering 1965 2103
BTech Mechanical Engineering 3570 3685
BTech Civil Engineering 6777 6421
BTech Biosciences and Bioengineering 7945 7164

Students clearing JEE Main/Advanced must appear in the JoSAA counselling to secure seats at the IITs. 

IIT Roorkee is one of the premier educational institutes in India and the best engineering college in Uttarakhand. It has consistently ranked among the top engineering colleges every year. Admission to engineering courses at IIT Roorkee is based on the JEE Advanced and GATE results.

What rank do you need to get into IIT Roorkee?

Keshav BeheraB.Tech from Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee

The JEE Advanced cutoff for every branch and college fluctuates yearly but the trend followed remains the same. The students instead of analyzing their own inclinations, look up the previous year's cutoff list to decide the choice of college and branch. This is a good method for those who are unaware of their passion and yet want to aim high
